institution.name: The College of the Florida Keys

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at The College of the Florida Keys fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (39.2% → 34.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The College of the Florida Keys fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The College of the Florida Keys rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (832 → 1.0k).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The College of the Florida Keys are 19% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($42.5k vs $35.6k).
